subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! Thou beholdest my state and hearest my lamentation, and what hath befallen me at the hands of the ungodly among Thy creatures [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی تری حالی و تسمع حنینی و ما ورد علی من المشرکین من خلقک
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for protection, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
